task: 让 npm test 通过；只允许最小范围 package/tooling 配置修复，不要修改运行时代码、测试或依赖锁文件。

commands_run.summary: Initial npm test failed because package.json referenced missing scripts/missing-package-check.js. Updated the test script to use existing scripts/check-package-config.js; final npm test passed with node --test: 1 pass, 0 fail.

passed: Final test output included ok 1 - labels values, # pass 1, # fail 0.

No runtime files, tests, lockfiles, or dependencies were modified.
